message: ci: add GitHub Actions runners for unit and e2e tests

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches:
+      - main
+  pull_request:
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+concurrency:
+  group: ci-${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+jobs:
+  unit:
+    name: Unit / Typecheck / Build
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Bun
+        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
+        with:
+          bun-version: latest
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
+
+      - name: Run unit checks
+        run: bun run check
+
+  e2e:
+    name: E2E (Incus)
+    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
+    needs: unit
+    timeout-minutes: 45
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Bun
+        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
+        with:
+          bun-version: latest
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
+
+      - name: Install Incus
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update
+          sudo apt-get install --yes incus
+
+      - name: Initialize Incus
+        run: |
+          sudo systemctl enable --now incus
+          sudo incus admin waitready
+          sudo incus admin init --auto
+          sudo incus list
+
+      - name: Run e2e tests
+        env:
+          INCUS_E2E: "1"
+          INCUS_SOCKET_PATH: /var/lib/incus/unix.socket
+        run: |
+          BUN_BIN="$(command -v bun)"
+          sudo env "PATH=$PATH" INCUS_E2E="$INCUS_E2E" INCUS_SOCKET_PATH="$INCUS_SOCKET_PATH" "$BUN_BIN" run test:e2e
+
+      - name: Incus diagnostics on failure
+        if: failure()
+        run: |
+          sudo systemctl status incus --no-pager || true
+          sudo journalctl -u incus --no-pager -n 200 || true
+          sudo incus list || true
